## Plugin version impact

<!-- Does this require a version bump in plugin.json? -->

- [ ] No version change needed (docs, CI, templates)
- [ ] Patch bump (bug fix)
- [ ] Minor bump (new skill/command/agent, backward compatible)
- [ ] Major bump (breaking change to existing skills/commands)

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional commit message (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`)
- [ ] Plugin JSON valid (`plugin.json`, `marketplace.json`)
- [ ] README updated if user-facing change
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated

## Security

- [ ] No secrets or credentials in committed files
- [ ] Hooks do not execute destructive operations without user confirmation
